modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Volleymetrics camera is not functioning and needs zoom adjustment.

full_description_text:  
I am having problem with the Volleymetrics camera. The camera is not working right and it is zoomed out too much. I need help to make the camera zoom in so I can see better. Please assist me with this issue.
short_description: Volleymetrics camera is not functioning and needs zoom adjustment.
description: I am having problem with the Volleymetrics camera. The camera is not working right and it is zoomed out too much. I need help to make the camera zoom in so I can see better. Please assist me with this issue.
